neighborhoods.name: Alto Boquete
neighborhoods.description: Elevated residential area above downtown with sweeping views of Volcan Baru and lush coffee plantations

housing.predominantType: Modern houses and gated community villas on large lots

neighborhoods.character_notes: Many expat-built homes with mountain views. Requires a car. Cooler temperatures year-round due to elevation (~1,400m).

neighborhoods.name: Downtown Boquete
neighborhoods.description: The compact town center along the Rio Caldera with shops, restaurants, the Tuesday market, and essential services

housing.predominantType: Apartments and small houses within walking distance of shops and services

neighborhoods.character_notes: Tuesday market is a social hub. Most restaurants and medical clinics are here. Flat terrain makes walking easy.

neighborhoods.name: Volcancito
neighborhoods.description: Rural hillside community northwest of downtown, known for coffee farms, cooler temperatures, and panoramic volcano views
neighborhoods.character: Rural, scenic, very quiet, coffee-country living

housing.predominantType: Fincas, standalone houses, and custom-built homes on large plots

neighborhoods.character_notes: Some of the best coffee in the world is grown here. Very steep roads -- 4x4 recommended. Misty mornings with stunning sunsets.

neighborhoods.name: Jaramillo
neighborhoods.description: Popular expat neighborhood east of downtown with established residential communities and river valley setting

housing.predominantType: Gated community houses and independent homes with gardens

neighborhoods.character_notes: Home to Valle Escondido and other gated communities with pools and clubhouses. Well-maintained roads. 5-minute drive to downtown.

neighborhoods.name: Palmira
neighborhoods.description: Lower-elevation area south of Boquete along the main road from David, warmer and more affordable than hillside neighborhoods
neighborhoods.character: Semi-rural, warmer, budget-friendly, gateway to Boquete

housing.predominantType: Local-style houses and newer affordable construction

neighborhoods.character_notes: More integrated with Panamanian culture. Warmer than central Boquete. Bus connections to David are accessible from here.
